name: GuyMannDude/mnemo-cortex
description: Persistent cross-agent semantic memory for AI agents (v2.0). Privacy-first share switch (separate/always/never + per-session toggle). Multi-agent with isolated writes and privacy-controlled reads. Local-first SQLite + FTS5, zero-cost compaction via local Ollama. Three integration paths: Claude Code, Claude Desktop, and OpenClaw MCP.
